message:
Add live Redis conformance tests for generic key commands

Add CORE_GENERIC_LIVE_STABLE_CASES with ~181 test cases covering:
- TYPE for all data types (string, list, set, hash, zset, stream)
- EXISTS single and multiple keys
- DEL/UNLINK single and multiple keys
- RENAME/RENAMENX with conflict handling
- COPY with and without REPLACE
- EXPIRE/PERSIST non-timing-dependent cases
- EXPIRE options (NX, XX)
- APPEND to new and existing keys
- GETDEL and GETEX
- OBJECT ENCODING for all encodings
- TOUCH single and multiple keys
- DBSIZE count
- KEYS pattern matching (wildcards, escapes, brackets)
- RENAME with TTL preservation and cross-type
- DUMP/RESTORE wrong arity

Excludes cases with unordered results (KEYS multi-match),
OBJECT REFCOUNT/FREQ (error format differs), and cases with
error message variations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 struct VendoredRedisOracle {
     child: Child,
     port: u16,
@@ -2279,3 +2483,27 @@ fn core_zset_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
     );
     assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
 }
+
+#[test]
+fn core_generic_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
+    let cfg = HarnessConfig::default_paths();
+    let oracle_server = VendoredRedisOracle::start(&cfg);
+    let oracle = LiveOracleConfig {
+        host: "127.0.0.1".to_string(),
+        port: oracle_server.port,
+        ..LiveOracleConfig::default()
+    };
+    let report = run_live_redis_diff_for_cases(
+        &cfg,
+        "core_generic.json",
+        CORE_GENERIC_LIVE_STABLE_CASES,
+        &oracle,
+    )
+    .expect("generic live diff");
+    assert_eq!(
+        report.total, report.passed,
+        "mismatches: {:?}",
+        report.failed
+    );
+    assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
+}
